title: Everything You Need to Know About the MEKI-8782 Modern Cat Tower
summary: A deep dive into why the MEKI-8782 has become a favorite for modern cat owners.
content:
Q: What makes the MEKI-8782 different?

A: The MEKI-8782 is crafted from Premium Solid Wood, ensuring furniture-grade quality and aesthetic integration.

Q: Is it stable?

A: Yes, featuring a heavy-duty reinforced base for multi-cat safety.

title: Wood vs. Carpet: Why Easy-to-Clean Furniture is a Game Changer
summary: Tired of trapped fur and odors? Discover the benefits of wood-finish cat trees.
content:
Q: Why avoid carpet?

A: Carpet acts as a 'fur magnet,' trapping dander and odors. Wood is non-porous and wipe-clean.

Q: How to maintain?

A: Simply wipe the wood with a damp cloth and machine-wash the removable cushions.
